DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert Capron Esq. 415-781-3355 for Defendant/Cross-Complainant BARRETT E. SHERMAN through Court Call.
Austin Bosargem Esq. 415-492-2041 of Turning Point for Cross-Defendant Straight Builders.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court itemizes the issues. Cross Defendant argues breach of contract, alter ego, implied indemnity. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT DAVID STRAIGHT, STRAIGHT BUILDERS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINANT OF SCHERMCO, INC., BARRETT E. SHERMAN, AND S.F. ACQUISITION FUND I. LLC.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Cross-defendants Straight Builders, Inc. and David Straight's demurrer to all three causes of action in the first amended cross-complaint is overruled as to all three causes of action. Cross-complainants adequately alleged contract and equitable indemnity claims against Straight Builders and also adequately allege alter ego liability against Mr. Straight. Liberally construed, the first amended cross-complaint sufficiently alleges negligent construction by Straight Builders that caused harm to plaintiffs that could support liability by Straight Builders to the plaintiffs supporting the equitable indemnity cross-claim. Also, liberally construed, the first amended cross-complaint sufficiently alleges diversion of funds and purposeful dissolution of Straight Builders that could support alter ego liability against Mr. Straight.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
